title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft revealed seven new in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1, Scout, Codename MDASH, and Majorana 2. The models span reasoning, agentic, and quantum capabilities, positioning Microsoft as both OpenAI's partner and competitor across the full AI stack.
